name: Ice Hockey
description: Ice Hockey is a fast-paced, two-team sports game played on an ice rink. The primary objective is to score more goals than the opposing team by shooting a puck into their net. Each team consists of a goalie and multiple skaters who can move freely on the ice. Players can skate, pass the puck to teammates, shoot at the goal, and check opponents to gain possession of the puck. The game is divided into periods of play. Face-offs occur at the beginning of each period and after stoppages in play. Penalties are awarded for illegal actions, such as tripping or high-sticking, resulting in the offending player being removed from the ice for a set amount of time, giving the other team a power play. A power play grants the non-penalized team a player advantage. The team with the most goals at the end of regulation time wins the game. Overtime periods may occur if the score is tied after regulation time, with sudden death rules in effect: the first team to score wins. The game should have a visible scoreboard displaying the current score and time remaining in the period. There should be multiple difficulty levels impacting AI behavior. Also the players should be able to play alone (1 player) against the computer AI and also against another player (2 players).

controls.arrow_up: Move player forward/upwards on the ice
controls.arrow_down: Move player backward/downwards on the ice
controls.w: Pass the puck to the nearest teammate in the direction the player is facing
controls.a: Switch control to the player positioned furthest to the left
controls.s: Shoot the puck towards the goal; shot power is determined by holding the key down
controls.d: Switch control to the player positioned furthest to the right
controls.space: Speed Boost/Skate Faster (limited duration; depletes a stamina bar)
controls.shift: Check opponent (attempt to knock the puck away; can result in penalties)
controls.q: Cycle through available strategies/formations (e.g., offensive, defensive)
controls.e: Manual Goalie Control (when controlling the goalie, moves the goalie right)
controls.x: Increase shot angle of the puck (move shot angle left)
controls.c: Decrease shot angle of the puck (move shot angle right)
